doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and its core legal position—removing pseudonymized data entirely from GDPR scope for non-key
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB didn't exist until 2018), and its core position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR principles (Recital 26 and the Breyer case), making it almost certainly AI-generated fabrication.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document purports to be from March 2026 (a future date), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and its core legal position—removing pseudonymized data entirely from GDPR scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR principles, strongly indicating AI-generated fabrication.
